mentions.note: Richard asks about chip cyclicality; NXPI is cyclical on semi-cyclical. Can't buy cyclical chips (have to buy then sell). Prefer to hold secular chip plays instead.
Automotive chip shortage driving 25% rally. Auto business has been albatross historically, but now must-have as software-defined vehicles proliferate.
Went parabolic after reporting this week; catalyst for ON Semi and auto-linked semiconductor strength.
